chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. S-1356 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ FRESH CASE 1) For orders on CMA No. 8550/2025. 2) For orders on CMA No. 8551/2025. 3) For hearing of main case. 10.02.2026. Mr. S. M. Akhtar Rizvi, Advocate for Petitioner. ___________________ Through the instant Petition, the Petitioner has impugned Judgment dated 26.08.2025 passed by learned Vth Additional District & Sessions Judge, Karachi West in Family Appeal No. 127 of 2024. The said Family Appeal emanated from the order dated 03.08.2024 passed in G & W No. 2404 of 2021 whereby, application under Section 151 CPC was preferred by the Petitioner for consolidation of two cases1. Perusal of the record reflects that the issues were framed in the noted Suit / proceedings back in the year 2023. The application for consolidation was preferred by the Petitioner not earlier than 06.05.2024. The said application was dismissed vide order dated 03.08.2024. The consolidation of the proceeding has been sought on the sole ground by the Petitioner that the dispute is between the same parties. However, from the perusal of the proceedings it is apparent that the nature of dispute and the relief claimed albeit between the same parties but issues are different. Therefor, no purpose will be served by consolidation of the Suit proceedings. In view of the above, the petition is without merits and is dismissed in limine. J U D G E Arshad/ 1 G & W No. 2404 of 2021 and Family Suit No. 1541 of 2021
